1_screen_definitions.viewport_target: Desktop Optimized (1440px dynamic tracking console layout)
1_screen_definitions.main_layout_template: Split Pane Ledger View (Left Pane Column: Real-Time Staged Material Picking Queues & Handling Status; Right Pane Workspace: Historical Physical Ledger Stock Auditing Spreadsheet & Adjustment Entry Workbench; Top Block Panel: Immediate Stock Discrepancy Alerts & Critical Minimum Threshold Indicator Stream)

responsive_breakpoints.desktop: min-width: 1280px (Renders concurrent material handling queues side-by-side with historical spreadsheet audits)
responsive_breakpoints.tablet_landscape: 1024px - 1279px (Active pick queues collapse into a toggleable left navigation slide panel)

user_progression_routes.on_load: Verify active warehouse agent access keys -> Open real-time data frame connection monitoring stock changes logs -> Execute state payload fetch from InventoryService.getInventoryMovements()

redirection_rules.condition: If a manual cycle-count adjustment entry overrides predefined safety balance rules without authorization strings
redirection_rules.action: Intercept input transaction flows instantly, throw high-priority screen warning 'Supervisor Security Override Required', and lock form confirmation buttons

atoms.type: Signed Whole Integer Form Input Control Component

molecules.composition: Combines dynamic task tracking code + warehouse location address link + target part allocation quantity details label + instant execution button element

organisms.composition: Vertical list layout wrapping real-time instance components elements of picking_queue_interactive_item_card cards mapping active background warehouse picking jobs hooks.
Virtualized grid table sorting massive historical ledger arrays records featuring keyword matching string filters, export mechanisms, and row selection modifiers arrays.
